name: Leave Policy
text: The Employee shall be entitled to leave as follows, subject to the applicable State Shops and Establishments Act and other applicable labour laws: (a) Earned Leave ('EL'): Eighteen (18) days per calendar year, accruing at the rate of 1.5 days per month of service; earned leave may be accumulated up to a maximum of forty-five (45) days and any excess shall lapse; (b) Sick Leave ('SL'): Twelve (12) days per calendar year for certified medical illness; sick leave shall not be accumulated and shall lapse if unused at year end; (c) Casual Leave ('CL'): Six (6) days per calendar year for personal matters; casual leave shall not be accumulated and shall lapse if unused; (d) Maternity Leave: As prescribed under the Maternity Benefit Act, 1961, including twenty-six (26) weeks of paid maternity leave for the first two children; (e) Public Holidays: National and state public holidays as declared by the Central and applicable State Government. Leave entitlements shall be pro-rated for periods of employment less than twelve (12) months.
invalid_if: Earned leave entitlement below minimum prescribed under applicable State Shops Act
Maternity leave below 26 weeks for first two children contrary to Maternity Benefit Act 1961
title: Leave Policy
